英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Milton Brydges於1525年出生在英國貝德福爾桑迪時，她的父親John Brydges32歲，母親Sibell Bromwich31歲。她於1545年與Edward Langley在英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年6月26日在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Milton Brydges于1525年出生在英国貝德福爾桑迪时，她的父亲John Brydges32岁，母亲Sibell Bromwich31岁。她于1545年与Edward Langley在英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1581年6月26日在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

nameMeanings.name: Milton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the numerous places so called, a large number of which get their name from Old English mylentūn ‘settlement with a mill’. Others were originally named as ‘the middle settlement (of three)’, from Old English middel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The surname is most famous as that of the poet John Milton ( 1608–74 ), and the given name is sometimes bestowed in his honour. Its most illustrious bearer in recent times has been the economist Milton Friedman ( 1912–2006 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Milton Brydges was born in 1525, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John Brydges, was 32 and her mother, Sibell Bromwich, was 31. She married Edward Langley in 1545, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 26 June 1581, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Milton Brydgesが1525年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで生まれた時，父John Brydgesは32歳，母Sibell Bromwichは31歳であった。1545年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディでEdward Langleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年6月26日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Milton Brydges(이)가 1525년 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Brydges(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibell Bromwich(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 Edward Langley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 6월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Milton Brydges родилась в 1525 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Brydges было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sibell Bromwich, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Langley в 1545 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 26 июня 1581 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
